name: Composio Direct
description: Direct access to 1000+ Composio automation tools — search, execute, batch-run, and authorize services like GitHub, Gmail, Slack, Notion, Jira, Linear without MCP transport

tools.name: composio_search_tools
tools.description: Search for Composio tool_slug values by query, toolkit name, or description

tools.name: composio_get_tool_schemas
tools.description: Fetch Composio input and output schemas for one or more tool_slug values

tools.name: composio_execute_tool
tools.description: Execute a single Composio tool_slug with given parameters

tools.name: composio_multi_execute
tools.description: Execute multiple Composio tool_slug values in parallel or sequentially

tools.name: composio_auth_link
tools.description: Get an OAuth authorization link for a Composio-connected service (GitHub, Gmail, Slack, etc.)

tools.name: composio_list_connections
tools.description: List Composio connected accounts for the current user with optional filters

tools.name: composio_get_connection
tools.description: Get one Composio connected account by connected_account_id
